Product Description

Step into elegance with this beautifully crafted Lehenga Choli suit set. The gown boasts a dramatic flare and premium inner lining for maximum comfort during long events. Complete with a matching pant and an embroidered shawl-style dupatta, this outfit is designed to make a statement at weddings and festive gatherings.

Top (Choli)

Fabric & Lining: Made from heavy, premium pure crepe silk fabric paired with a soft micro cotton inner lining.

Work & Details: Beautifully adorned with elegant embroidery sequence work combined with fine thread work details.

Fit & Sizing: Comes fully stitched and is available in sizes XS to XXL.

Bottom (Lehenga)

Fabric & Lining: Crafted from premium pure crepe silk material and finished with a comfortable micro cotton inner lining.

Work & Volume: Features matching heavy embroidery sequence with thread work patterns along with a beautiful 3.50-meter flair layout.

Size: Available in size 44.

Dupatta

Fabric & Size: Crafted from pure crepe silk fabric with a total length measurement of 2.30 meters.

Artwork: Detailed with heavy embroidery beads and sequence work with thread accents running throughout.

Wash Instructions

First Wash: Dry clean recommended to maintain the fabric texture and sequence work.

Subsequent Washes: Gentle hand wash separately in cold water using a mild liquid detergent.

Care Advice: Do not wring or twist. Dry in shade away from direct sunlight to prevent color fading. Iron on low heat on the reverse side only.
